sourcesContent:
Admin Template Manager

Live templates visible to users

This page helps verify whether uploaded templates are actually available in the public gallery.

{{ template.category }}

{{ template.name }}

Source: {{ isUploadedTemplate(template) ? 'Uploaded template' : 'Seeded template' }}

Preview URL: {{ template.previewImageUrl }}

{{ template.premium ? 'Premium' : 'Free' }} Open as User
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { ResumeTemplate } from '../../../core/models/resume.model'; import { ResumeService } from '../../../core/services/resume.service'; @Component({ selector: 'app-template-manage', templateUrl: './template-manage.component.html' }) export class TemplateManageComponent implements OnInit { templates: ResumeTemplate[] = []; loading = true; constructor(private readonly resumeService: ResumeService) { } ngOnInit(): void { this.resumeService.getTemplates().subscribe({ next: (templates) => { this.templates = templates; this.loading = false; }, error: () => { this.loading = false; } }); } isUploadedTemplate(template: ResumeTemplate): boolean { return template.previewImageUrl.startsWith('http://localhost:8080/uploads/') || template.previewImageUrl.includes('/uploads/'); } }
